pairs.question: How long does shipping take?
pairs.answer: Shipping typically takes 3–7 business days within Sri Lanka. International shipping may take 2–4 weeks depending on the destination. We use eco-friendly packaging and carbon-neutral shipping options where possible.

pairs.answer: Yes, we ship internationally. Delivery usually takes 2–4 weeks depending on your country. Customs and duties are the responsibility of the recipient.

pairs.question: What is your return policy?
pairs.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for unused items in original condition. Due to the handmade nature of our products, some items may not be returnable—please check individual product descriptions.

pairs.question: How do I return an item?
pairs.answer: Contact us via WhatsApp or email to start a return. Items must be unused and in original condition. We'll guide you through the process and arrange refund or exchange.

pairs.question: Do you offer refunds?
pairs.answer: Yes. Unused items in original condition can be refunded within 30 days. Refunds are processed to the original payment method. Some handmade or custom items may be non-returnable.

pairs.question: Can I exchange my order?
pairs.answer: Yes. Contact us within 30 days with the item unused and in original condition. We can arrange an exchange for size, style, or another product.

pairs.question: I want to cancel my order
pairs.answer: If your order hasn't shipped yet, contact us right away and we'll try to cancel it. Once shipped, you can use our return process after delivery.

pairs.question: Item arrived damaged
pairs.answer: We're sorry to hear that. Please contact us with your order number and a photo. We'll arrange a replacement or refund.

pairs.question: Wrong item received
pairs.answer: Contact us with your order number and what you received. We'll arrange the correct item or a full refund.

pairs.question: How long do refunds take?
pairs.answer: Refunds are processed to the original payment method once we receive the return. It may take a few business days to appear depending on your bank or card.

pairs.question: Can I return custom jewelry?
pairs.answer: Custom or personalised pieces may not be returnable due to their one-of-a-kind nature. Check the product page or contact us before ordering.

pairs.question: Return shipping cost?
pairs.answer: Return shipping is usually the customer's responsibility unless the error was on our side (e.g. wrong or damaged item). We'll confirm when you contact us.

pairs.question: Do you accept exchanges?
pairs.answer: Yes. Within 30 days, unused items in original condition can be exchanged. Contact us to start the process.

pairs.question: What materials do you use?
pairs.answer: We use recycled metals (silver, gold-plated), upcycled crystals and beads, sustainable leather alternatives, and other eco-friendly materials. All materials are sourced responsibly.

pairs.question: Are your products hypoallergenic?
pairs.answer: Most pieces use sterling silver or gold-plated materials, which are generally hypoallergenic. If you have known metal allergies, we recommend checking with a healthcare professional or asking us about specific materials.

pairs.question: Is the jewelry real silver?
pairs.answer: We use recycled sterling silver and gold-plated options. Product pages specify the materials for each piece. All metals are sourced from sustainable or recycled sources.

pairs.question: What does upcycled mean?
pairs.answer: Upcycled means we give existing materials a new life instead of throwing them away. We use reclaimed metals, beads, and other elements to create unique, eco-friendly jewelry.

pairs.question: Do you use real gold?
pairs.answer: We use gold-plated and recycled metal options. Each product page states whether a piece is gold-plated or sterling silver. We don't use newly mined gold for sustainability.

pairs.question: Where do your materials come from?
pairs.answer: We source recycled and upcycled materials from responsible suppliers. Metals, beads, and other elements are reclaimed or recycled to reduce environmental impact.

pairs.question: Are the beads natural?
pairs.answer: We use a mix of natural and upcycled beads. Product descriptions specify materials. Many pieces use natural stones or recycled glass beads.

pairs.question: Is it sustainable?
pairs.answer: Yes. We focus on recycled metals, upcycled materials, and responsible sourcing to make our jewelry as sustainable as possible.

pairs.question: What metal is this ring?
pairs.answer: Materials are listed on each product page—e.g. recycled sterling silver or gold-plated. If you tell me the product name I can help you confirm.

pairs.question: Do you use recycled silver?
pairs.answer: Yes. We use recycled sterling silver in many of our pieces. This reduces the need for newly mined silver and supports sustainability.

pairs.question: Are materials eco-friendly?
pairs.answer: We prioritise eco-friendly and recycled materials: recycled metals, upcycled beads and crystals, and sustainable alternatives where we can.

pairs.question: What are the stones made of?

pairs.question: How do I care for my jewelry?
pairs.answer: Care varies by piece. Generally, avoid water and chemicals, store in a jewelry box, and clean with a soft cloth. Specific care instructions are included with each purchase.

pairs.question: Can I wear the rings in the shower?
pairs.answer: We recommend removing jewelry before showering, swimming, or using lotions to keep it in best condition. Sterling silver and plated pieces can tarnish with prolonged moisture.

pairs.question: How do I clean silver jewelry?
pairs.answer: Use a soft, dry cloth for regular cleaning. For deeper cleaning, a mild soap and water rinse followed by drying is fine. Avoid harsh chemicals and abrasive cloths.

pairs.question: How to store bracelets?
pairs.answer: Store in a dry place, ideally in a jewelry box or pouch to avoid scratches and tangling. Keep away from humidity and direct sunlight.

pairs.question: My silver turned dark
pairs.answer: Silver can tarnish with exposure to air and moisture. Gently polish with a soft cloth or a silver cleaning cloth. Avoid harsh chemicals.

pairs.question: Can I use perfume with your jewelry?
pairs.answer: Apply perfume before putting on jewelry, and avoid spraying it directly on pieces. Chemicals in perfumes can affect plating and some stones.

pairs.question: How to maintain gold plated jewelry?
pairs.answer: Keep it dry, avoid chemicals and abrasives, and store separately. Wipe with a soft cloth after wear to slow tarnishing. It may need re-plating over time.

pairs.question: Care for bead necklaces?
pairs.answer: Avoid water and chemicals. Wipe with a soft, dry cloth. Store flat or hung to avoid stretching the thread. Keep away from sharp objects.

pairs.question: How to prevent tarnishing?
pairs.answer: Store in a dry place, avoid prolonged moisture and chemicals, and wipe with a soft cloth after wear. Anti-tarnish strips in your jewelry box can help.

pairs.question: Can I swim with your jewelry?
pairs.answer: We don't recommend it. Chlorine and salt water can damage metals and plating. Remove jewelry before swimming or bathing.

pairs.question: How to clean gold plated?
pairs.answer: Use a soft, dry or slightly damp cloth. Avoid abrasive or chemical cleaners. Store in a dry place when not worn.

pairs.question: Best way to store rings?
pairs.answer: Store in a jewelry box or soft pouch, separate from other pieces to avoid scratches. Keep away from humidity and direct sunlight.

pairs.question: Jewelry care tips?
pairs.answer: Avoid water and chemicals, store properly, clean with a soft cloth. Specific instructions come with each piece.

pairs.question: Can I sleep with jewelry on?
pairs.answer: We recommend removing jewelry before sleep to avoid snagging, tangling, or damage. It also helps reduce tarnishing.

pairs.question: How to clean bracelets?
pairs.answer: Wipe with a soft, dry cloth. For metal bracelets, a mild soap and water rinse is fine. Avoid harsh chemicals. Dry thoroughly.

pairs.question: How to clean earrings?
pairs.answer: Wipe with a soft, dry cloth. Avoid submerging in water if they have glue or delicate elements. Check product care instructions.

pairs.question: Storage for necklaces?
pairs.answer: Store in a jewelry box or hang to avoid tangling. Keep away from humidity and direct sunlight.

pairs.question: Tarnish removal?
pairs.answer: Use a soft cloth or a silver polishing cloth. Avoid harsh chemicals. For severe tarnish, consider a professional cleaner.

pairs.question: Waterproof jewelry?
pairs.answer: Our jewelry is not designed to be worn in water. Remove before showering, swimming, or washing hands to preserve it.

pairs.question: Care instructions?
pairs.answer: Care varies by piece. Generally: avoid water and chemicals, store in a dry place, clean with a soft cloth. Details come with each order.

pairs.question: How to take care of rings?
pairs.answer: Remove before showering or using chemicals. Store in a pouch or box. Clean with a soft cloth. Avoid knocking against hard surfaces.

pairs.question: Polish silver?
pairs.answer: Use a soft cloth or a silver polishing cloth. For light tarnish, gentle rubbing is enough. Avoid abrasive or chemical polishes on plated items.

pairs.question: Lotion and jewelry?
pairs.answer: Apply lotion before putting on jewelry, and avoid getting lotion on pieces. Chemicals can affect plating and some stones.

pairs.question: Sweat and jewelry?
pairs.answer: Wipe pieces with a soft cloth after wear if you sweat. Avoid leaving them on during heavy exercise or in humid conditions for long periods.

pairs.question: Care for chains?
pairs.answer: Store untangled, avoid pulling. Wipe with a soft cloth. Keep away from chemicals and moisture.

pairs.question: Oxidation on silver?
pairs.answer: Silver can oxidise (darken) with exposure. Polish with a soft or silver cloth. It's normal and can be cleaned.

pairs.question: Re-plating?
pairs.answer: Gold-plated pieces may need re-plating after long-term wear. We don't offer re-plating; you can seek a local jeweller for that service.

pairs.question: Care for crystals?
pairs.answer: Wipe gently with a soft, dry cloth. Avoid water and chemicals. Store so they don't knock against harder materials.

pairs.question: Care for pearls?
pairs.answer: If we use pearl or pearl-like elements, wipe with a dry cloth and avoid chemicals and water. Store separately to avoid scratches.

pairs.question: Anti-tarnish?
pairs.answer: Store in a dry place and use anti-tarnish strips or pouches in your jewelry box to slow tarnishing.

pairs.question: How can I contact you?
pairs.answer: You can reach us via WhatsApp, email (plusarch.lk@gmail.com), or the inquiry form on the website. Business hours: Mon–Fri 9AM–6PM, Sat 10AM–4PM.

pairs.question: What is your WhatsApp number?
pairs.answer: You can contact us on WhatsApp at +94 774442642. We're happy to help with product questions, custom orders, and support.

pairs.question: What's your email?
pairs.answer: Our email is plusarch.lk@gmail.com. We respond during business hours: Mon–Fri 9AM–6PM, Sat 10AM–4PM.

pairs.question: When are you open?
pairs.answer: Business hours: Mon–Fri 9AM–6PM, Sat 10AM–4PM. You can message anytime via WhatsApp or email; we'll reply when we're open.

pairs.answer: Reach us on WhatsApp (+94 774442642), email (plusarch.lk@gmail.com), or the website inquiry form. We'll get back to you as soon as we can.

pairs.answer: We operate mainly online. For visits or pickup, contact us via WhatsApp or email and we can confirm if that's possible.

pairs.answer: Yes. Find us on Instagram at plusarch_upcycle. We post new designs and behind-the-scenes there.

pairs.answer: We're based in Sri Lanka and ship locally and internationally. For a physical address or pickup, contact us via WhatsApp or email.

pairs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
pairs.answer: We accept common payment methods at checkout, including cards and local options. Exact methods are shown when you place an order. All transactions are secure.

pairs.question: Can I pay on delivery?
pairs.answer: Payment options depend on your region. Check the checkout page for available methods. For Sri Lanka, we may offer cash on delivery where applicable.

pairs.question: Do you accept card payments?
pairs.answer: Yes. Card and other payment options are available at checkout. The exact methods are shown when you place your order.

pairs.question: Is checkout secure?
pairs.answer: Yes. We use secure payment processing. Your card details are handled by our payment provider, not stored on our site.

pairs.question: Can I pay in instalments?
pairs.answer: Instalment options depend on the payment methods we offer at checkout. Check the checkout page or contact us to see what's available for your order.

pairs.question: Do you accept PayPal?
pairs.answer: Payment methods are listed at checkout. If PayPal isn't shown, contact us—we may be able to accommodate alternative arrangements for your region.

pairs.question: Payment in LKR?
pairs.answer: Yes. Prices are in LKR for Sri Lanka. Checkout will show the total and accepted payment methods in local currency.

pairs.question: Cash on delivery?
pairs.answer: For Sri Lanka, we may offer cash on delivery where applicable. Check checkout for available options.

pairs.question: Credit card?
pairs.answer: Yes. Credit and debit cards are typically accepted at checkout. See the checkout page for the full list.

pairs.question: Debit card?
pairs.answer: Yes. Debit cards are typically accepted. Check the checkout page for your region.

pairs.question: Bank transfer?
pairs.answer: Payment methods are shown at checkout. If bank transfer is available, it will be listed there.

pairs.question: Secure payment?
pairs.answer: Yes. We use secure payment processing. Your card or payment details are not stored on our servers.

pairs.question: Payment options?
pairs.answer: Options are displayed at checkout and may include cards, COD (where available), and other local methods.

pairs.question: Pay in USD?
pairs.answer: Our prices are in LKR. If you're overseas, your card or payment provider may convert. Check checkout for your currency.

pairs.question: Payment when?
pairs.answer: Payment is taken at checkout when you place your order. For COD, you pay on delivery.

pairs.question: Visa Mastercard?
pairs.answer: We typically accept major cards including Visa and Mastercard. Check the checkout page for your order.

pairs.question: Payment failed?
pairs.answer: Check your card details and try again. If it keeps failing, try another method or contact us with your order details.

pairs.question: Invoice?
pairs.answer: Order confirmation and details are sent by email. For a formal invoice, contact us after ordering.

pairs.question: Receipt?
pairs.answer: Order confirmation is sent by email and serves as your receipt. For a formal receipt or invoice, contact us.

pairs.question: Refund to card?
pairs.answer: Refunds are processed to the original payment method. Card refunds may take a few business days to appear.

pairs.question: Where is my order?
pairs.answer: Once your order is shipped, we send tracking details by email. If you haven't received them or have concerns, contact us via WhatsApp or email with your order number.

pairs.question: How do I check my order status?
pairs.answer: We'll email you when your order is confirmed and when it's dispatched. For more details, contact us with your order number and we'll look it up.

pairs.question: Has my order shipped?
pairs.answer: You'll receive an email with tracking when it ships. If you haven't had an update, contact us with your order number and we'll check.

pairs.question: When will I get my order?
pairs.answer: Local orders usually arrive in 3–7 business days after dispatch; international 2–4 weeks. Check your email for tracking once it's shipped.

pairs.question: I didn't get tracking
pairs.answer: Check spam and promotions folders. If you still don't see it, contact us with your order number and we'll resend or look up the status.

pairs.question: Order not received
pairs.answer: First check your tracking email. If the delivery window has passed, contact us with your order number and we'll investigate with the courier.

pairs.question: Can you resend my order confirmation?
pairs.answer: Contact us with the email you used to order and we'll resend the confirmation and any tracking we have.

pairs.question: Order status?
pairs.answer: We email you when the order is confirmed and when it's dispatched. For details, contact us with your order number.

pairs.question: Tracking info?
pairs.answer: Tracking is sent by email when your order ships. Check spam. If missing, contact us with your order number.

pairs.question: When was my order shipped?
pairs.answer: You'll have received an email when it shipped. For the exact date, contact us with your order number.

pairs.question: Order delayed?
pairs.answer: Check your tracking for updates. If it's significantly late, contact us with your order number and we'll follow up with the courier.

pairs.question: Change delivery address?
pairs.answer: Contact us immediately with your order number and new address. We can only change it if the order hasn't shipped yet.

pairs.question: Reschedule delivery?
pairs.answer: Contact us or the courier (using the tracking link) to see if rescheduling is possible.

pairs.question: Order confirmation?
pairs.answer: You should receive an email confirmation after placing your order. If not, check spam or contact us with your email and order details.

pairs.question: Lost order?
pairs.answer: Contact us with your order number. We'll check tracking and work with the courier to resolve it.

pairs.question: Wrong address on order?
pairs.answer: Contact us right away with your order number. If it hasn't shipped we may be able to correct it.

pairs.question: Order number?
pairs.answer: Your order number is in the confirmation email we sent when you placed the order. Check your inbox and spam.

pairs.question: How to track?
pairs.answer: Use the tracking link in the dispatch email we sent you. If you don't have it, contact us with your order number.

pairs.question: Delivery status?
pairs.answer: Check the tracking link in your shipping email. For help, contact us with your order number.

pairs.answer: We'll email you when the order is confirmed and when it's shipped. For a specific update, contact us with your order number.
